display_information.name: Workout Planner
display_information.description: Plan your weekly workouts across Ballard fitness studios
display_information.long_description:
A workout planning assistant for the Busterville Montana family! Plan your weekly fitness schedule across:

• Ballard Public Pool 🏊
• barre3 Ballard 🩰
• solidcore Ballard 💪
• Cycle Sanctuary 🚴
• Greenlake Running Group 🏃
• Solo runs 👟

Features:
- Weekly workout planning to hit your 5-workout goal
- Booking reminders for each studio's booking window
- Seattle weather integration for outdoor runs
- Google Calendar integration to check availability
